---
name: Add or remove lemma
about: Add a new lemma to an existing synset or remove an existing lemma from a synset
title: ''
labels: lemma
assignees: ''

---

**Synset**
Please give the code of the synset of the form ewn-00000000-x and one of the existing lemmas

**Lemma**
Please give the lemma you wish to add or remove and state whether this is an addition or a removal

**Motivation**
Please explain why this lemma should be added to or removed from this synset
